description: Greek-substrate anchor lens. Pivots English 'truth' onto ἀλήθεια's logos.aletheia.verity atom via the grc cognition pack's field hook. Renders surface as English compound 'unconcealment'. Dual-correction pair with he_logos_v1: same domain atom (logos.aletheia.verity), different substrate and cognitive mode — Greek aletheia is phenomenological disclosure (truth-as-unconcealment), Hebrew emet is covenantal reliability. Atom confirmed in grc_logos_cognition_v1 lexicon (grc-core-cog-002). See ADR-0073c.
